data.current_description: Returns Google search results for the given query including organic results, knowledge graphs, ads, related questions, and more.
data.description_suggestion: Scrapes real-time Google search results for a given query. Accepts 11 parameters including query string, location, language, pagination, and result filtering options. Returns a GoogleSearchResponse object containing organic results, knowledge graphs, ads, related questions, and search metadata. Supports pagination via page parameter. Requires API key authentication.
